since_last: 42% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.38%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.66% · Gold -2.28% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 42% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.38%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.38%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.04%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.69%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.98%, CBRS +5.22%, HON +5.20%, GEV +4.87%, INTC +4.19%. Laggards: TSLA -13.69%, GOOGL -6.76%, CRNC -5.96%, PATH -4.51%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.64% at $117.15
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
